transcript: I don't know what you're talking about. Come on. Oh, Dylan. Where is she? Kitchen. Blood? Yeah. A lot? Is it everywhere? Still fresh? Sort of. I think, I think. You know, I normally don't come out here on such short notice. I need to be paid up front, do you understand? I swear she was right there. Are you sure? I'm sure. No one could have moved her. Could it be that you simply forgot to check that she was dead? She was out cold. But not dead. I'm done. What? Where are you going? Can't you fucking dispose of a body if nobody has died? He's got to be in here somewhere. I'll pay you. Do you really think that would be? A murderer? Goodbye then. Come on. 컴온 아 I know, I know, you don't want me calling in this phone, but this is important. It's just, I don't think she's completely dead. I'm pretty good at that. © BF-WATCH TV 2021
